# checkpointsase_enhanced_network_health (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_networks" "all" {}

# Health check for a single enhanced network.
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_network_health" "first" {
  network_id = data.checkpointsase_enhanced_networks.all.networks[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) The ID of the enhanced network to retrieve health status for.

### Read-Only

- `health_checks` (List of Object) The list of health check results for tunnels in the enhanced network. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--health_checks))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--health_checks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `health_checks`

Read-Only:

- `network_id` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `tunnel_id` (String)
- `tunnel_name` (String)
- `type` (String)
